title: anthoxanthum equisetum
intro: Anthoxanthum equisetum, also known as sweet grass, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, native to Europe and western Asia. The medicinal properties of sweet grass include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of sweet grass include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. Sweet grass can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
